name: innorve-method
description: Eight installable teaching skills for architecting AI into organizations. Open implementation of the Innorve Method (IM-01 through IM-08), the methodology taught at Innorve Academy.

plugins.name: innorve-method
plugins.description: The full Innorve Method — 8 teaching skills (IM-01 through IM-08) plus the index. Coaches you through architecting AI-native systems from blank.
